title: Emergency Powers
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with rushed execution and lack of proper review process

prevention.rule: Block governance proposals with rushed execution and lack of proper review process
prevention.trigger: Governance proposal executed within a short timeframe without proper review

monitoring_rules: Block governance proposals executed within a short timeframe without proper review
summary: MakerDAO rushed through an emergency proposal that significantly altered protocol parameters without proper review, silencing reform advocates. A guard could have detected and blocked such proposals with a short timeframe and lack of review.
